p-venice.desc: A three-day inspiration trip conceived for senior creatives around the Venice Biennale — programming, guest experience, and the full production apparatus, from agendas to the smallest printed piece.

p-grandpalais.title: Inspiration Days, Grand Palais
p-grandpalais.desc: A series of Inspiration Day events staged at the Grand Palais for Art Basel Paris and Paris Photo — creative direction of the programme, communications, and event materials.

p-music.title: Music Culture Sessions
p-music.desc: A listening-bar event series across three cities, developed with independent partners — a study in how sound cultures can carry a house’s creative programme.

p-cartier.title: Cartier Special, Cover Production
p-cartier.desc: Line production for a Cartier Special cover shoot — pre-production, call sheets, studio coordination, and the quiet choreography that makes a cover possible.

p-unhome.title: UNHOME, Paris Edition
p-unhome.desc: Art direction and editorial support for a nomadic design retail concept — from manifesto to event, design for the real home.

p-carhartt.title: French Voice Programme
p-carhartt.desc: A large-scale French product copywriting programme — 135 pieces — with iterative calibration of the brand’s voice across the collection.

p-ashaalia.title: Brand Audit & Product Language
p-ashaalia.desc: A comprehensive brand and website audit for a hand-embellished womenswear house, followed by a full product copy rewrite, inventory architecture, and wholesale outreach strategy.

p-middaia.title: Trunk Show Press Campaign
p-middaia.desc: Press campaign and contact architecture for a New York trunk show — a jewellery house introduced to a new city with precision.

p-form.title: Archive Intelligence Platform
p-form.desc: Archive lead and platform architecture for a fashion archive intelligence platform — taxonomy, editorial programming, and the frameworks through which a collection becomes knowledge.

p-academy.title: FORM Academy
p-academy.desc: A video series combining biographical analysis with close readings of fashion collections — designers read through their gestures, one collection at a time.

p-milan.title: Milan Design Week Editorial
p-milan.desc: Co-curated editorial coverage of Milan Design Week with FORMÆ Magazine — commissioned articles and client communications for a design-literate audience.

services.name: Creative Strategy Consulting
services.desc: Positioning, cultural programming, long-term creative vision.

services.name: Art Direction Consulting
services.desc: Visual systems, typographic identities, image direction.

services.name: Marketing, Storytelling & Wholesale
services.desc: Product language, brand narrative, wholesale strategy.

services.name: Production & Celebrity Coordination
services.desc: Shoots, VIP trips, cultural events, guest experience.

writing.title: Gestures and Temporalities of Fashion
writing.venue: Study day — Institut Français de la Mode, co-organiser
writing.summary: A co-organised study day bringing together designers, archivists, and researchers to examine how the fashion gesture is repeated, transmitted, and altered over time.

writing.title: On the Sustainability of the Fashion Design Gesture
writing.venue: Doctoral research — Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne / Università di Bologna
writing.summary: Ongoing doctoral research examining the fashion design gesture as a unit of craft knowledge, and what its sustainability means for designers, ateliers, and archives.

writing.title: Boro — Repair as Embodied Knowledge
writing.summary: A conference paper reading the Japanese boro tradition as a form of embodied, generational knowledge — repair as authorship rather than concealment.

writing.title: Conversations
writing.summary: An ongoing interview series with the people who hold fashion’s institutional memory — designers, archivists, and makers, in their own words.

writing.title: Thoughts on Fashion
writing.summary: A running collection of essays on fashion theory, craft, and repair cultures — short, considered pieces written between formal research and practice.

writing.title: FERAL — Selected Writings
writing.summary: Selected writings from FERAL, an independent editorial platform for criticism and long-form thinking on fashion and image culture.

site.heroHeadline: C19 Consulting is a Paris-based creative consultancy providing end-to-end support for fashion, luxury and cultural brands. Founded by PhD candidate Cyana-Djoher Anaïs Hadjali, the studio combines strategic thinking, creative direction and research-led methodologies to build brands with long-term cultural relevance.
site.aboutIntro: C19 Consulting is the practice of Anaïs Cyana-Djoher Hadjali — consultant, researcher, and writer working at the intersection of fashion, art, and archives.
site.aboutPara1: Founded in Paris, C19 works with brands, institutions, and platforms on creative strategy, art direction, production, and editorial projects. The practice is grounded in doctoral research on the fashion design gesture (Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne / Università di Bologna), and treats every engagement with the method of the archive: close attention, precise description, care.
site.aboutPara2: Work is conducted in English and French, from Paris and wherever the project requires — most recently Venice, Milan, New York, and Tokyo.
